changeSet.author: bilous

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM enrollment e JOIN course c ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE c.title = 'course_1' ) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lesson WHERE title = 'c1_m1_lesson_1') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lesson WHERE title = 'c1_m1_lesson_2') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lesson WHERE title = 'c1_m1_lesson_3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM lesson_completion WHERE enrollment_id IN ( SELECT e.id FROM enrollment e JOIN course c ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE c.title = 'course_1' ) AND lesson_id IN ( SELECT id FROM lesson WHERE title IN ('c1_m1_lesson_1', 'c1_m1_lesson_2', 'c1_m1_lesson_3') );
